display.purpose: Landing page hero headlines only. Never inside the app shell.

headline.purpose: Page titles: h1 inside org routes.

title.purpose: Card headers, section labels, sidebar group headers.

body.purpose: Running text, table cells, descriptions. Max 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Form labels, metadata, badge text. Uppercase in form context.

shadows.name: xs
shadows.purpose: Default card shadow. Nearly imperceptible lift.

motion.name: spring-default
motion.purpose: Sidebar open/close, header hide/show. Framer Motion spring.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call-to-action button. Violet background, white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 8px 16px; background: oklch(0.541 0.245 293); color: #fff; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease, transform 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.48 0.22 293); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(1 0 0), 0 0 0 5px oklch(0.541 0.245 293 / 0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action button. Transparent with border.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 8px 16px; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); transition: background 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0 0); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.708 0 0); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.5); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Tertiary action in toolbars and nav. No border, no background at rest.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 8px 16px; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.301 0 0); font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0 0); color: oklch(0.145 0 0); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.5); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Standard content container with border and gentle shadow.
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(1 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); border-radius: 18px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); } .ds-card__title { font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-card__body { font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); }

components.name: Input Field
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; } .ds-field__label { font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } .ds-field__input { height: 36px; padding: 4px 12px; background: transparent; border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); border-radius: 8px; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); transition: border-color 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease; } .ds-field__input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.556 0 0); } .ds-field__input:focus { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.708 0 0); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.2); }

components.name: Nav Item
components.description: Sidebar navigation item with icon and label.
components.html: Dashboard
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 10px; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0 0); color: oklch(0.145 0 0); } .ds-nav-item--active { background: oklch(0.97 0 0); color: oklch(0.145 0 0); font-weight: 600; } .ds-nav-icon { width: 20px; height: 20px; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Colored status indicator for active, warning, error states.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; } .ds-badge--success { background: oklch(0.92 0.04 145); color: oklch(0.35 0.12 145); } .ds-badge--warning { background: oklch(0.92 0.06 85); color: oklch(0.40 0.12 85); } .ds-badge--error { background: oklch(0.92 0.04 27); color: oklch(0.40 0.12 27); } .ds-badge--info { background: oklch(0.92 0.04 260); color: oklch(0.40 0.12 260); }

narrative.overview:
Merlin is a pocket tool — compact, direct, always at hand. Like a digital Swiss Army knife for Latin American SMBs managing fleets, kitchens, finances, and teams. The interface disappears into the task: no chrome competes with the data, no decoration exists without function. Every screen answers one question fast, whether the user is a business owner at a desk or a field operator checking their phone under the sun.

The system is achromatic by doctrine. Pure neutral grays carry the structure; a single violet accent marks interactive elements and brand moments. This restraint is not minimalism for its own sake — it's operational clarity. When violet appears, it means something.

The feel is soft and welcoming, not cold or clinical. Gently rounded corners, smooth transitions, and generous touch targets communicate that this tool was built for real people with busy hands, not for design portfolios.
keyCharacteristics: Achromatic structure with a single violet accent
Soft, rounded component language (10-18px radii on containers)
Full light/dark theme parity via OKLCH tokens

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Violet is the only chromatic color in the structural palette. Status colors appear contextually in badges and alerts — they never carry structural weight.

rules.name: The Dark Parity Rule
rules.body: Every light-mode surface has a dark-mode counterpart. No component may hardcode bg-white or text-black. Semantic tokens are the only source of truth.

rules.name: The Weight Ladder Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy is expressed through weight (700 → 600 → 500 → 400), not size alone. Size steps are small; weight does the heavy lifting.

rules.name: The Flat-at-Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear as response to elevation change or interaction, never as decoration.

dos: Do use semantic tokens (bg-card, text-foreground, border-border) for every surface.
Do maintain 4.5:1 contrast ratio on all body text.
Do use 44px minimum touch targets on every interactive element.
Do pair every bg-*-100 badge with its dark:bg-*-900/30 dark:text-*-300 counterpart.
Do use text-wrap: balance on headings and text-wrap: pretty on body prose.
donts: Don't use hardcoded colors (bg-white, text-black, bg-slate-800) in any component.
Don't use border-left or border-right > 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't create ERP-like interfaces: no 30-field forms, no tables-only UI, no nested navigation.
Don't add a second chromatic accent color beyond violet.
Don't use shadows heavier than shadow-sm on cards at rest.
Don't add motion that blocks content visibility.
